QBlade documentation and task description: 'Refine Globally to set the number of panels to exactly 160'. Raw S1223 has 81 points; 160 is a standard panel count used in QBlade airfoil analysis (confirmed in research literature and QBlade docs).
verifier.py line 78: checks if abs(actual_panels - target_panels) <= tolerance_panels; metadata value of 5 is consistent with typical discretization tolerances
Task description: 'Set T.E. Gap to 0.4% chord (Value: 0.004)'; 0.4% = 0.004 in chord-normalized coordinates
verifier.py line 89: checks if abs(actual_gap - target_gap) <= tolerance_gap; tolerance of 0.001 (0.1% chord) is reasonable for TE gap validation
verifier.py lines 101-102: normalization check uses hardcoded 0.01 tolerance for both chord range (0.99-1.01) and x_min range (-0.01-0.01); directly confirmed in verify function
verifier.py line 107: derotation check uses hardcoded 0.01 tolerance (abs(te_center_y) < 0.01); directly confirmed in verify function
setup_task.sh line 22; URL verified as valid and accessible (HTTP 200); returns real S1223 airfoil with 81 coordinate points
Direct download and analysis of https://m-selig.ae.illinois.edu/ads/coord/s1223.dat; raw file contains 1 header line + 81 coordinate pairs
Direct analysis of downloaded S1223 data; both trailing edge points are at (1.0, 0.0), resulting in zero TE gap
Direct analysis of downloaded S1223 data; chord length = 0.99995 (within [0.99, 1.01]); x_min = 0.00005 (within [-0.01, 0.01])

privileged_info_summary: The normalize_refine_airfoil task processes the S1223 airfoil from the SELIG database (https://m-selig.ae.illinois.edu/ads/coord/s1223.dat), a real high-lift low-Reynolds-number airfoil. The raw airfoil contains 81 coordinate points and is already normalized (chord ≈ 1.0, x_min ≈ 0) with zero trailing edge gap. The task requires: (1) normalizing to chord=1 with origin at LE, (2) de-rotating to align chord with x-axis, (3) refining to exactly 160 panels (tolerance ±5), and (4) setting the trailing edge gap to 0.004 (0.4% chord) with blend distance 0.2. Output file path is /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/s1223_modified.dat. All tolerances (normalization: 0.01, derotation: 0.01, TE gap: 0.001) are hardcoded in the verifier.
